title: Packed Bundles
description: Mojang won't add backpacks but bundles are close enough
body:
Information
---
Bundles are cool and kinda like backpacks, so I gave them a fancy new texture

Versions
---
This should work in 1.17 to current.

Have issues or a suggestion?
---
Report it on the Github issue tracker so I know I need to fix something :D

This tweak not for you?
---
Check out my other projects, I might have something you didn't know you needed! :D
